steps.title: Find the sculpture contrast
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a difference between Uros Island and Golden Connection. The relevant notes give two contrasts: Uros Island belongs to the Uros series and uses smooth multicolored LED domes, while Golden Connection belongs to the Huanchaco series and uses entangled blue and white LED tubes.

steps.title: Reject similarity or one-work focus
steps.content: B treats the works as similar LED sculptures, C discusses only Uros Island, and D blurs the difference by grouping domes and tubes together as examples of LED forms. The needed sentence must name both works and make the contrast explicit by opposing smooth domes with tangled tubes. The answer is A.
